title: Emirates issues travel rules amid Ebola outbreak as US, Canada increase airport screening measures
summary_full: Emirates has issued a travel advisory due to tightened Ebola-related entry requirements by the US and Canada for travelers from Uganda. This response to Uganda's latest outbreak includes enhanced health screenings and monitoring, reflecting increased global aviation caution following the pandemic.
